name: The Lampless Market
descriptionSeed: Trade conducted entirely by touch, voice and reputation. Nothing is displayed because display is meaningless here; you ask, and you are told, and the telling is binding. Umbral merchants find the surface habit of LOOKING at goods before buying them frankly indecent — as if a seller's word were insufficient. Prices are honest. Lies here are not immoral so much as impractical: in a place where nobody can see your face, your word is the only face you have.
encounterFlavor: Merchants whose word is iron; surface traders sweating in the dark; a fence who harbors what the light hunts, and does it as a public service.
questSeeds: Someone has been buying up harbored things and not harboring them
A surface merchant wants to bring lanterns to market and cannot understand why this is an atrocity
